error_signature: only metadata shown when uploading file
title: File upload only returns metadata
symptom: When uploading a .txt file using the Form Submission node, only metadata is shown instead of the file content.
not_this_if: File content is visible in the preview but not in the output
root_cause: The issue arises because the binary field name in the node does not match the expected name for the uploaded file. n8n requires the binary field to be correctly configured to extract the file content.
fix_steps: Open the Form Submission node settings
Ensure the binary field name matches the name of the uploaded file
Re-run the workflow to check if the content is extracted
agent_instruction: Match the binary field name in the Form Submission node with the name of the uploaded file.
